はぁ……。何度やっても上手くいかない……。<br>わたしには向いてないのかもしれ:
*sigh*... No matter how many times I try, I can't get it right. Maybe I'm
just not cut out for this...
あ、司令官。新しい攻撃技の練習をしていたのですが、<br>わたし、剣の才能は全然:
Ah, Commander. I was practicing a new attack technique, but it seems
I have no talent for the sword at all...
いざという時に、モンスターを倒せない護衛なんて、<br>司令官さまのお傍に仕える:
A guard who can't defeat monsters in a crisis is of no use at Lord
Commander's side, right? *sigh*...
え……？ こないだ見つけたあの花を思い出せ！？<br>あの花は、盾の形で、花言葉:
Huh...? That flower I found the other day! It's shield-shaped, with
flower language 'Unwavering Loyalty'... *gasp*!
わたしは司令官さまのお傍でお守りする『盾』でした！<br>司令官さまを盾でお守り:
I was a 'shield' protecting you at your side, Lord Commander! I want
to devise a technique purely for protecting you with a shield.
